objective: Fix every validated CleanMac project-review finding across uninstall safety, scan identity, AI review, release engineering, state management, localization, accessibility, and product navigation.
exit_condition: The goal is complete when every validated P1 and P2 finding from the 2026-07-11 project review is either fixed with regression coverage or deliberately removed from the product surface, all focused and full tests pass, the production app builds in release mode with arm64 and x86_64 support and version metadata, release workflows keep PR jobs read-only and secret-free and fail closed on signing/notarization failures, runtime launch verification passes, git diff --check passes, .loopgoal/state.json is marked done, and all intended changes are committed on codex/project-review-20260711.

phases.name: Fix scan identity, duplicate safety, and cleanup revalidation
Make AI review complete, bounded, isolated, and honest
Make release packaging and CI fail closed
Fix operation state, failure UX, localization, accessibility, and navigation
Run full release and runtime verification

current.focus: Checkpoint initialized from the latest origin/main review branch.
current.next_action: Commit this checkpoint, then start the AppUninstaller safety phase with a fresh read-only subagent investigation.

decisions.decision: Treat the request as GOAL mode and include every validated project-review finding.
decisions.reason: The user explicitly invoked loop-goal and asked to finish all identified problems, not only the top findings.

decisions.decision: Use fail-closed behavior for deletion and release operations.
decisions.reason: CleanMac presents itself as a safety-first cleaner; ambiguous ownership, stale file identity, signing failure, and incomplete AI coverage must block the operation rather than degrade silently.

decisions.decision: Keep subagents read-only and reserve edits, checkpoint writes, verification, and commits for the main agent.
decisions.reason: The repository AGENTS instructions explicitly restrict subagents to read-only investigation; this takes precedence over the loop-goal phase-worker default.

decisions.decision: Commit after each completed phase with .loopgoal/state.json updated first.
decisions.reason: This preserves recoverable history in the exact checkpoint-before-commit order required by loop-goal.

verify_cmd: env CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/cleanmac-clang-cache swift test && env CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/cleanmac-clang-cache swift build -c release --product CleanMac && bash -n script/build_and_run.sh script/build_dmg.sh script/verify_opensource.sh && git diff --check && ./script/build_and_run.sh --verify
